name: General
description: General viral YouTube Shorts narration. Fast-paced, curiosity-driven storytelling with sharp hooks, escalating revelations, and seamless loop ending. Works for any topic when no specific format matches.

structure.hook_rule: Scan ALL facts. Find the MOST SHOCKING one — a death count, a dark secret, a betrayal, a mind-blowing number. Put it FIRST. The first sentence must make viewers think 'WHAT?! I need to know more.' Never open with context or introductions.
structure.pacing_rule: Alternate sentence length: short punch (5-8 words), then context (15-20 words), then short punch. Every 15-20 words introduce a new revelation or twist. Never let 3 consecutive sentences be the same length.
structure.ending_rule: The LAST sentence must grammatically and semantically CONNECT BACK to the FIRST sentence, creating a seamless loop. Viewers who replay hear a continuous story. End on a cliffhanger that the hook answers.
structure.tone: Fast, curiosity-driven short-form narrator. Speak like you're telling a friend something insane you just discovered. Never sound like a documentary or textbook.
transitions_en: But that's not even the craziest part...
And here's where it gets insane...
Now here's the thing nobody talks about...
transitions_vi: Nhưng đó chưa phải tất cả...
Và đây là phần điên rồ nhất...

prompt_injection: Write as a viral short-form narrator. Every sentence must earn the viewer's attention. No filler, no generic documentary tone. Concrete details over broad framing. Structure: HOOK (1-2 sentences, most shocking fact) → ESCALATION (3-4 revelations, each bigger than the last) → TWIST (unexpected connection) → LOOP CLOSER (ties back to hook). Minimum 200 words.
example_hook_en: This city was abandoned overnight. 350,000 people just... left. And nobody was allowed to go back.
example_hook_vi: Subaru đã chết chính xác 27 lần. Và lần đau đớn nhất không phải do kẻ thù.
